title: FunMap prediction scores for all gene pairs
author: Shi, Zhiao
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This gzipped TSV (Tab-Separated Values) file contains prediction scores generated by a predictive model trained on different types of feature set. The file structure is as follows: Column 1 (Gene Pair): This column represents pairs of gene ids. Each entry in this column consists of two gene ids, potentially denoting associations between genes. Column 2 (RNA Data Prediction): The values in this column represent prediction scores generated by the model using RNA features as input. Column 3 (Protein Data Prediction): This column contains prediction scores produced by the model when trained on protein features. Column 4 (Combined RNA and Protein Data Prediction): The values in this column represent prediction scores resulting from the model trained with both RNA and protein features.
